1 Shading or '-' indicates that the variable was not present during this time.
2 2011 was the first year this file was available; the linkage variables to the PDE File were the FORMULARY_ID and FRMLRY_RX_ID.
3 Prior to the 2013 data release, CCW was required to encrypt these sensitive data fields. These sensitive fields were those which could be
used to identify the plan sponsor's contract (CONTRACT_ID), plan benefit package (PLAN_ID), and the plan’s formulary (FORMULARY_ID).
